evals.prompt: Run microservices-decomposer on this repository and produce a full assessment report
evals.expected_output: Structured report with evidence-tagged findings, prioritized recommendations, and next steps

assertions.text: Output contains a TL;DR or Executive Summary section

evals.prompt: Quick microservices-decomposer health check — focus on critical issues only, 1-page max
evals.expected_output: Concise 1-page summary with top 3 critical findings and immediate actions

assertions.text: Output identifies at least 1 critical finding

evals.prompt: Compare current microservices-decomposer state against industry best practices and identify gaps
evals.expected_output: Gap analysis with current vs target state, remediation roadmap

assertions.text: Output contains gap analysis or comparison
Output references industry standards or best practices
Output provides improvement roadmap or remediation plan
